automation.listIntro: Automatically create leads on a recurring schedule, or when an item is created.
automation.noAutomationsHint: Create one to spawn leads on a schedule or when items are created.
automation.loadAutomationsError: Failed to load automations. Please try again.
automation.saveAutomationError: Failed to save automation. Please try again.
automation.phase3ActionNote: Available after Phase 3. You can configure it now — it runs once the channel is connected.
automation.anyColumnHint: Leave as "Any column" to fire on every column change.
automation.dateArrivedHint: The before / on / after selector sets the direction; the number is how many days (e.g. 7 days before the date). Runs hourly in the workspace timezone.
automation.dormantTriggerNote: {{note}}. You can save this automation now — it will start firing once the feature ships.
automation.groupNameMatchHint: Only when group name matches (regex, optional)
automation.thenCreateTasks: Then create the following leads in the new group:
automation.errorChooseStatusValue: Choose the value the status should become
automation.errorOffsetWholeNumber: Days offset must be a whole number
automation.errorAddTaskTemplate: Add at least one lead template
automation.errorTaskDueNonNegative: Lead {{index}}: due in days must be a non-negative number
automation.errorInvalidRegex: Group name pattern is not a valid regex: {{error}}
automation.errorPickWeekday: Pick at least one day of the week
automation.errorDayOfMonthRange: Day of month must be between 1 and 28 (or use "Last day of the month")
automation.errorDueNonNegative: Due in days must be a non-negative number
automation.webhookNoColumns: This board has no columns to map.
automation.webhookPathUnresolvedTitle: This path did not resolve in the sample payload
automation.intakeDescription: Automatically assign and welcome new leads as they arrive.
automation.strategyRoundRobinHint: Distribute leads evenly across a pool of agents.
automation.strategyGeoHint: Route leads to an agent based on their city.
automation.strategyFixedHint: Always assign new leads to one agent.
automation.geoFallbackNote: Leads from unlisted cities fall back to round-robin.
automation.welcomeMailboxNote: The welcome email is sent from your connected mailbox.
automation.noCheckboxColumns: No checkbox columns on this board
automation.checkboxCheckedHint: Fires when this checkbox becomes checked.
automation.noNumberColumns: No number columns on this board
automation.numberCrossedHint: Fires when the number crosses the threshold in the chosen direction.
automation.movedToGroupHint: Fires when an item moves into the chosen group (leave blank for any group).
automation.updatePostedHint: Fires whenever an update is posted to a board item.
automation.noFilterableColumns: This board has no columns to filter by yet.

pages.noLeadsScheduled: No leads scheduled for this range.
pages.failedToLoadCalendar: Failed to load calendar. Please try again.
pages.couldNotReschedule: Could not reschedule that lead. Reverting.
pages.columnMissing: Column missing — this view references a column that no longer exists.
pages.usageTerms: By signing in you agree to internal usage terms.
pages.pickBoardForForm: Pick a board for this form.
pages.formBuilderIntro: Build a public form that creates leads on this board — submissions run through the same lead intake as inbound webhooks.
pages.pickBoardToMapFields: Pick a board to map fields to its columns.
pages.noFieldsYet: No fields yet — add one from a board column above.
pages.notMappedToColumn: Not mapped to a column (stored on the lead note for legacy boards).
pages.addFieldsToPreview: Add fields to preview the form.
pages.inviteLinkDescription: Share this link with teammates to let them join.
pages.oldInviteLinksStop: Old invite links will stop working immediately.
pages.deleteOrgWarning: Permanently deletes the workspace, all boards, leads, automations, and removes every member. This cannot be undone.
pages.failedToDeleteOrg: Failed to delete organisation. Please try again.
pages.actionPermanent: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
pages.deleteOrgBulletBoards: Delete every board, group, lead, comment, and update in this workspace
pages.deleteOrgBulletAutomations: Delete all automations configured for this workspace
pages.deleteOrgBulletNotifications: Delete all notifications scoped to this organisation
pages.deleteOrgBulletMembers_other: Remove all {{count}} members from the workspace
pages.aiKeysDescription: Add your own Anthropic (Claude) or OpenAI (ChatGPT) API key to power the automation drafter. Keys are encrypted and only used for your account.
pages.aiKeyReplaceHint: enter a new value to replace
pages.aiDefaultModelHint: Used by “Describe what you want” on the automations page. You can switch it there too.
pages.failedToDeleteAccount: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
pages.connectedViaGoogle: Connected via Google — cannot be changed.
pages.deleteAccountWarning: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
pages.deleteAccountBulletOrgs: Delete all organisations you own (including all their boards, leads, and members)
pages.deleteAccountBulletRemove: Remove you from all other organisations
pages.deleteAccountBulletLeads: Delete all your personal leads and comments
pages.deleteAccountBulletProfile: Delete your profile and all account data
pages.onlyAdminsCreateBoards: Only org admins can create boards from templates.
pages.boardTemplatesDescription: Pre-built board layouts. Pick one and we'll seed a new board with the right columns.
pages.globalAllLeads: Global — all leads by due date
pages.giveViewName: Please give the view a name.
pages.pickSourceColumn: Pick a source (date or timeline) column for a board view.
pages.resourceLayoutNeeds: A resource layout needs a board and a resource column.
pages.sourceColumnPlaceholder: Pick the column that supplies the date
pages.filterValuesHelp: Values use option ids for status/dropdown/tags and user ids for person columns.
pages.whatsAppDescription: Connect your Twilio WhatsApp sender so the SEND_WHATSAPP automation and the lead WhatsApp tab can message leads. Sends outside the 24-hour window require an approved template.
pages.authTokenHelperWhatsApp: Stored encrypted. Never shown again — enter a new value to replace it. Shares the Twilio account with SMS.
pages.whatsAppSenderHelper: The approved WhatsApp-enabled number (E.164). The Twilio sandbox number works for testing.
pages.smsDescription: Connect your Twilio account so the SEND_SMS automation and the lead SMS tab can text leads.
pages.authTokenHelperSms: Stored encrypted. Never shown again — enter a new value to replace it.
pages.defaultSenderHelper: E.164 format. Leave blank if you use a Messaging Service SID.
pages.optOutFooterHelper: Add “Reply STOP to opt out” to outbound messages (TCPA/CASL) unless the body already mentions STOP.
pages.gmailBlurb: Send & receive from your Google mailbox
pages.microsoftBlurb: Send & receive from your Outlook mailbox
pages.oauthNotConfigured: {{provider}} OAuth is not configured on the server.
pages.emailConnectionDescription: Connect your mailbox so emails sent from leads arrive from your real address.
pages.brandHeadlinePlaceholder: Overrides the form name on the public page
pages.leadSourceHint: Auto-tag every submission with a source so the Marketing/ROI report can attribute these leads.

filter.noConditions: No conditions yet — add one to start filtering.

reports.customDashboardDesc: Build charts from any board in this workspace.
reports.noWidgetsAdmin: Add a chart widget — e.g. a Stage funnel over your CRM board, or leads by source.
reports.noWidgetsMember: No dashboard widgets have been set up yet.

workspace.noBoards: No boards in this workspace yet.
workspace.permissionsNote: Manage who can access this workspace and its boards. Granular access controls (Viewer / Editor per board) arrive in the next stage; for now, manage members from the Members page.

automationsHub.title: Automations
automationsHub.subtitle: See, control, and monitor every automation across all your boards.
automationsHub.loadError: Could not load the automations hub
automationsHub.adminOnly: The Automations Hub is available to admins only.
automationsHub.noAutomationsDesc: Create automations on any board, then manage them all from here.
automationsHub.allHealthyDesc: No automations need setup and none have failed recently.
automationsHub.healthFailing: Failed {{count}} time(s) in the last 7 days
automationsHub.healthNeedsSetup: Incomplete — a channel or reference needs to be connected
automationsHub.connectionsIntro: Native channels automations can send to. Manage credentials in Workspace settings.

folders.title: Folders
folders.deleteConfirm: Delete folder "{{name}}"? Its boards move to the default folder.

perm.title: Access control
perm.subtitle: Grant members access to specific boards, folders, or the whole workspace.
perm.empty: No access grants yet. Everyone sees public boards; grant access to private ones here.

myDay.title: My day
myDay.subtitle: Agent cockpit
myDay.noLeadsSub: When leads are routed to you, they will appear here.
myDay.noVisitsSub: The booking system is coming soon — your visits will show here.
myDay.allCaughtUpSub: No follow-ups due. Nice work staying on top of things.

booking.title: Booking links
booking.subtitle: Create a public visit-booking link per building. Visitors pick a time; we create the lead, assign an agent, and email a confirmation.
booking.emptySub: Create one to let clients book property visits online.
booking.dateColumnHint: Pick a date column so the visit shows on the board calendar.
booking.errHours: Set at least one available day

bookPublic.notAvailable: This booking link is not available.
bookPublic.noSlotsSub: There are no open slots right now. Please check back later.
bookPublic.name: Your name
bookPublic.submitError: Could not complete the booking. Please try again.
bookPublic.confirmedSub: Your visit to {{title}} is booked. A confirmation email is on its way.
bookPublic.cancelPromptSub: This will cancel your booking for {{title}}.
bookPublic.cancelledSub: Your visit has been cancelled. You can book a new time anytime.
bookPublic.cancelErrorSub: This link may have expired. Please contact the agent.
bookPublic.detailsHint: By proceeding, you confirm the visit details above. You can reschedule any time from your confirmation email.
bookPublic.virtualPhoneHint: Your agent will call you on WhatsApp video at this number.
bookPublic.howToMeet: How would you like to meet?

sequences.title: Email sequences
sequences.subtitle: Build multi-step email cadences that send automatically over days — and stop the moment a lead replies. Open and click tracking is built in.
sequences.name: Sequence name
sequences.deleteConfirm: Delete the sequence “{{name}}”? Active enrollments will stop.
sequences.emptyBody: Create your first drip cadence to follow up with leads automatically.

map.noColumnBody: Add a Location column to your board to plot leads and properties on a map.
map.noPins: No leads have a pinned location yet.

leadApi.intro: Connect any external form to this board. Point it at the endpoint below with your API key — every submission becomes a new lead here. You don’t map fields up front:
leadApi.introEmphasis: the first submission automatically defines your columns
leadApi.step1Body: Both are below. The key authenticates your form to this board only.
leadApi.step2Body: POST the form fields to the endpoint with the X-API-Key header. Use any field names you like.
leadApi.step3Body: The first submission creates a column per field (detecting emails, phones, numbers…). After that, any new field you send automatically adds a column — every lead always lands in the right place.
leadApi.keyOnceWarning: Copy this now — for your security it won’t be shown again.
leadApi.htmlKeyNote: A key embedded in a public page is visible in its source. It can only create leads on this one board and is rate-limited, but for stricter control POST from your server (cURL/JavaScript) and keep the key server-side.
leadApi.columnsEmpty: No submissions yet. Your columns will appear here automatically after the first one lands.
leadApi.evolveOnHint: New fields in future submissions will create new columns automatically.
leadApi.evolveOffHint: Schema is frozen: unknown fields are logged as warnings and won’t create columns.
leadApi.recentEmpty: Nothing yet. Send a test submission with the snippet above to confirm it works.
leadApi.resetConfirm: Forget the current field mapping? The next submission will define the columns again. Existing board columns are kept.
leadApi.sectionDesc: Already have a form on your site? Create a key and POST submissions to the endpoint — the first submission defines the columns and every lead lands on this board.
leadApi.createError: Could not create the API key.
leadApi.updateError: Could not update the API key settings.
leadApi.deleteError: Could not delete the API key.
leadApi.deleteConfirm: Delete this API key? Any form still using it will stop creating leads.
